data.name: UnexpectedError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while processing the request.

data.name: barberNameRequired
data.value: The Title is required.

data.name: clientNameRequired
data.value: The Title is required.

data.name: serviceNameRequired
data.value: The Title is required.

data.name: AmountGreaterThanZero
data.value: The Amount must be greater than zero.

data.name: DateCannotBeFuture
data.value: The Date cannot be in the future.

data.name: PaymentMethodInvalid
data.value: The Payment Method is not valid.

data.name: StatusInvalid
data.value: The Payment Method is not valid.

data.name: BillingNotFound
data.value: Billing not Found.

data.name: WeekStartMustBeMonday
data.value: The date must be a Monday.

data.name: InvalidMonth
data.value: The month provided is invalid. Please provide a value between 1 and 12.

data.name: nameRequired
data.value: Name is required.

data.name: nameTooShort
data.value: Name must be at least 3 characters long.

data.name: nameTooLong
data.value: Name must not exceed 100 characters.

data.name: emailRequired
data.value: Email is required.

data.name: emailInvalid
data.value: The provided email is not valid.

data.name: emailTooLong
data.value: Email must not exceed 150 characters.

data.name: passwordNotStrongEnough
data.value: The password must be at least 8 characters long and contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character.

data.name: InvalidSpecialCharacter
data.value: The password must contain at least one valid special character.

data.name: EmailAlreadyExists
data.value: Email already in use.

data.name: EmailOrPasswordInvalid
data.value: Invalid email or password.

data.name: InvalidToken
data.value: Invalid or expired refresh token.
